title: Pure Storage FlashArray SafeMode snapshot immutability audit
dataSources: Protection snapshot policy metadata in `purestorage:volume` and related alerts in `purestorage:alert`
app: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (5513)
spl:
index=storage sourcetype="purestorage:volume"
| eval sm=coalesce(safemode_enabled, snapshot_safemode, protection_group_safemode)
| where isnull(sm) OR sm="false" OR sm="0"
| stats values(volume_name) as volumes by array_name
| where mvcount(volumes) > 0
description: SafeMode immutability underpins ransomware recovery guarantees for snapshots. Volumes or groups without SafeMode weaken legal and cyber insurance evidence.
value: Demonstrates immutability coverage for auditors and speeds incident response when restore points must be trusted.
implementation: Extend volume JSON parsing to include SafeMode flags from Purity REST. Join protection groups if modeled separately. Export weekly CSV for GRC archives.
visualization: Table (array, volumes missing SafeMode), single value (% volumes protected).

references.title: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase)

knownFalsePositives: Short spikes during approved changes, maintenance windows, or known batch jobs can match the rule; confirm against the vendor console and change calendar.
grandmaExplanation: We track copy and mirror health so a planned outage or a bad link does not leave you with an old or broken remote copy when you need it most.
